title: Auxiliary Fractions
desc: The beauty of the vedic sutras cannot be more displayed by any other episode other than the auxiliary fraction episode. Learn how to solve 1/19 and other similar fractions to over 20 decimal. S01 E02.

title: Divisibility ? The Negative Osculator
desc: This episode on divisibility using the Negative Osculators will show you a never before seen rule to understand if a particular number is divisible by another or not. A Must see for all. S01 E18.
